name: forge-method-core
tagline: Keep Codex on rails while messy ideas become durable work.
summary: Forge Method Core is a Codex-native workflow runtime for long-horizon product, software, creative, game, and builder work: it bullies weak assumptions, preserves state, and writes receipts.
description: Keeps project state in files instead of chat memory.
Routes startup through preflight decisions before broad context loading.
Routes substantive human intent through Guidance Engine before following stale state actions.
Checks for safe Git marketplace updates before startup and summarizes new versions.
Provides a tiny emergency reload skill when a chat is stuck on stale instructions.
Starts empty and brownfield work with human guidance before technical state details.
Uses guided brain dump, pace selection, and correction routing before narrowing broad human ideas into artifacts.
Challenges new ideas through Reality/Evidence Gate before market or implementation claims.
Creates durable project scaffolds with stories, artifacts, evals, checkpoints, evidence, and recovery context.
Supports packaged modules for software, creative, game, runtime-builder, test, launch, and core-runtime work.
Validates progress with local gates, fixture smokes, and clone/install distribution checks.
first_run_prompts: Start Forge Method in this workspace.
Resume this Forge Method project from file state.

codex_marketplace: codex plugin marketplace add DanielCarva1/forge-method-core --ref main
Open Codex Plugins or /plugins, choose the Forge Method marketplace, then install or enable Forge Method Core.

assets.title: First-run flow
assets.alt: Flow from plugin install to preflight decision, durable project state, build verification, and ready operation.

privacy_and_state: Project progress is stored under .forge-method/ in the user's workspace.
The runtime does not require external services for local state, project routing, or quality gates.
GitHub is used only when users clone, push, or publish through their own repository workflow.
publication_status: metadata-ready; public directory submission is external
